basics.name: Md Rezwanul Haque
basics.label: PhD Candidate · AI Researcher
basics.summary: Incoming PhD candidate in Electrical and Computer Engineering at the University of Waterloo, researching multimodal machine learning, large language models, and agentic AI systems at the CPAMI Lab.

work.name: Centre for Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (CPAMI) Lab
work.summary: Conducting advanced research in multimodal machine learning and large language models at the CPAMI Lab, University of Waterloo. Designing transformer-based architectures and multi-agent systems for human-centered AI applications.

courses: 🔬 Research: Agentic Systems for Embodied AI · Multi-Agent Embodied Systems with Shared Visual Understanding · World Models & Visual Cognitions for Embodied Agents
👨‍🔬 Supervisor(s): Prof. Fakhri Karray & Prof. Zhou Wang
🔬 Focus: Multimodal ML · LLMs · Human-Centered AI
👨‍🔬 Supervisor(s): Prof. Fakhri Karray & Prof. Pin-Han Ho
📝 Thesis: “A Study on Non-Invasive Hemoglobin Measurement Techniques and Predictions.”
